title: Rename Commands
description: This mod adds two commands to quickly rename entities and items in creative mode.
body:
# Rename Commands

This mod adds two commands that help with renaming items and entities faster in creative mode.

### Commands:

```
/rename <entity> <name>
```
This command will rename the item that the target is holding in their main hand. It's comparable with the functionality of an anvil.


```
/rename <entity>
```
This command works like the command listed above, but it resets the name instead of changing it.


```
/renameentity <entity> <name>
```
This command will rename the entities specified in the command.


```
/renameentity <entity>
```
This command works like the command listed above, but it resets the names instead of changing them.
